name:
I'm underwater in
thick murky fluid
description:
I'm underwater in
thick murky fluid
hints: Underwater in thick murky fluid. A soggy towel is here. You cannot breathe indefinitely - act fast.
GET TOWEL. SWIM with specific directions. Do NOT try to SAY anything underwater - you drown. SWIM UP to surface.
GET TOWEL, then SWIM UP to return to the moat surface. The towel can be squeezed or dried for use later. Do NOT SAY anything - instant drowning.
SWIM DOWN reaches the bottom. SWIM EAST may lead somewhere. SWIM WEST is blocked by a wall. SWIM UP to escape before you drown.
notes: Underwater in the enchanted moat. Contains a soggy towel (useful when dried/squeezed). SWIM UP to surface. SAY anything underwater causes death (drowning - 'Blub!'). The water is enchanted - undirected swimming fails. Wall blocks west. The moat bottom may be reachable by swimming down.
